message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Package Vod Detail

participant "PackageVodDetail" as PVD
participant "VodProductManager" as VPM
participant "MBS" as MBS

rectangle "STB" {
    activate PVD
    
    PVD -> MBS : get package vod detail infos
    activate MBS
    MBS --> PVD : package vod detail infos
    deactivate MBS
    
    PVD -> VPM : getProductButtons(productList)
    activate VPM
    VPM --> PVD : product buttons
    deactivate VPM
    
    opt [getting Push for vod purchased]
        MBS -> PVD : purchasePush(offerId)
        activate MBS
        deactivate MBS
        
        PVD -> MBS : get user discount intofs
        activate MBS
        MBS --> PVD : discount/cash coupon, membership point
        deactivate MBS
    end
    
    opt [vod product contains offerId]
        PVD -> MBS : get package vod detail infos
        activate MBS
        MBS --> PVD : package vod detail infos
        deactivate MBS
        
        PVD -> VPM : getProductButtons(productList)
        activate VPM
        VPM --> PVD : product buttons
        deactivate VPM
    end
    
    deactivate PVD
}

note bottom
When entering the single package detail
|Function|Interface|
|get package vod detail infos|get package vod detail (GET /service/packagedetail)|row|
|get user discounts|get discount infos (GET /service/retrieveowncouponhomeinfo)|row|

When vod is purchased. Getting push message from MBS
|Function|value|
|purchasePush|offer id|row|
end note

@enduml
```
